note: Canonical source of truth for all tasks. TASKS.md and dashboard/data.js are generated from this file. Only the Lead edits it.

phases.title: Phase 0 — Foundation
phases.desc: The coordination system: manual, roles, templates, task board, dashboard, brand & architecture grounding.

phases.title: Phase 1 — Direction
phases.desc: Advisors answer the big strategic questions in their lanes; Lead synthesizes into locked decisions (ADRs).

phases.title: Phase 3 — Build
phases.desc: Astro shell + globe island + Atlas API on Cloudflare.

phases.title: Phase 4 — Migrate
phases.desc: Cut over from v1 when at parity.

tasks.title: Repo structure + AGENTS.md operating manual
tasks.scope_in: Create the full repo directory tree and AGENTS.md (roles, the two laws, the task lifecycle, where everything lives).

tasks.title: Task system (tasks.json + TASKS.md generator)
tasks.scope_in: Define tasks.json schema and seed all Phase 0/1 tasks; generate human-readable TASKS.md and dashboard data from it.

tasks.title: Live progress dashboard
tasks.scope_in: Self-contained dashboard/index.html (brand-styled): overall %, per-phase and per-advisor swimlanes, status pills, live GitHub status strip, auto-refresh.

tasks.title: MISSION.md grounding pack
tasks.scope_in: One-page ground truth every advisor reads first: what The Orchard is, what v2 is, constraints, lexicon, brand essence, grounding URLs.
definition_of_done: Accurate to VISION.md and live site

tasks.title: Brand & voice reference
tasks.scope_in: Port v1 design tokens (colors, gradient, radii, type) and codify the voice (anti-hype) + visual language into docs/brand/.
definition_of_done: Usable by advisors and the build

tasks.title: Advisor guides + templates
tasks.scope_in: End-to-end guide per advisor (Grok/Gemini/ChatGPT) + the Lead role; Task Brief, Deliverable, and ADR templates.
tasks.scope_out: Assigning actual tasks (that's the seed backlog).

tasks.title: Globe/Atlas architecture brief (ADR)
tasks.scope_in: Document the staged globe architecture: rendering (deck.gl+MapLibre, three.js deep), LOD across 4 zoom levels, Cloudflare data tiling, performance budget summary, cold-start, privacy, staged build path.
definition_of_done: Covers rendering, data, perf, cold-start, privacy, migration

tasks.title: Decision log seeded (ADR 0001, 0002)
tasks.scope_in: Record the coordination model (ADR-0001, Accepted) and the tech-stack working assumption (ADR-0002, Proposed).

tasks.title: 'The Orchard in 2036' positioning + category
tasks.scope_in: One-sentence positioning for 2036 + the category we own; 2-3 alternates with trade-offs; lead with a recommendation.
tasks.scope_out: Visual design; marketing taglines (Grok); market data (Gemini).

tasks.title: Persona ranking + the single 60-second action
tasks.scope_in: Rank the audiences (now vs. later); pick the primary persona; define the single most important action a first-time visitor should take in 60 seconds and why.

tasks.title: Information architecture / sitemap + progressive disclosure
tasks.scope_in: Sitemap + navigation for v2; how the cinematic globe coexists with a fast functional site; how a buyer, an operator, and a researcher each get where they need; progressive disclosure rules.

tasks.title: Fruit -> data-class legend
tasks.scope_in: The legend mapping fruit types to sensor/data classes; how size/color/freshness encode real metrics; rules that keep it legible (not cluttered) and scalable from 3 to 100k Trees.
tasks.scope_out: 3D rendering implementation (Lead); exact color hex (defer to brand).
definition_of_done: Maps only to plausible sensor types, assumptions flagged

tasks.title: Node-state & gamification model
tasks.scope_in: What a Tree looks/does across states (healthy, idle, offline, failed, withered, new growth); honest gamification that motivates uptime without hype or fake density.
definition_of_done: No mechanics that misrepresent the network

tasks.title: DePIN competitor teardown
tasks.scope_in: Sourced teardown of 6 DePIN projects (model, traction, tokenomics, data products); one thing to borrow + one to avoid per project; a comparison table.
tasks.scope_out: Our own positioning/copy (Grok); our financial model (separate task).

tasks.title: Data-buyer & use-case research
tasks.scope_in: Who buys environmental sensor data, for what, at what rough price, via what channels; rank use cases (academic, municipal, insurance, agtech, climate) by fit for The Orchard.
definition_of_done: Use cases ranked by fit + reasoning

tasks.title: Financial model v0
tasks.scope_in: A v0 model of revenue streams across 1/3/10-year horizons (hardware, data/API, community, services, licensing, sponsorship), rough cost structure, and marketing spend; all assumptions explicit.

tasks.title: Nonprofit / compliance research
tasks.scope_in: Research how a 501(c)(3) interacts with token/NFT/crypto activity: UBIT, charitable solicitation, data-as-public-good vs. commercial use; summarize considerations and where a professional is required.
tasks.scope_out: Giving legal advice; choosing a structure (that's Richard's call with counsel).
definition_of_done: No claim presented as legal advice

tasks.title: Positioning & messaging pillars
tasks.scope_in: 3-4 messaging pillars; a headline/subhead system; tagline options building on GROW · CONNECT · EARN; how we sound against other DePIN projects — all anti-hype.
tasks.scope_out: IA/UX (ChatGPT); the 2036 category sentence (ChatGPT); hard market data (Gemini).

tasks.title: Community & growth plan
tasks.scope_in: Channel strategy (X, Discord, Reddit, Chia + maker communities), content cadence, referral/quest/ambassador mechanics, and 2-3 launch hooks for the v2 globe.
definition_of_done: Realistic for a solo founder + small community

tasks.title: Real-time DePIN market pulse
tasks.scope_in: What narratives/launch tactics are landing in DePIN right now and what we should borrow or avoid; cite the actual posts/threads/articles.
tasks.scope_out: Rigorous competitor teardown with traction numbers (Gemini owns that).

tasks.title: Globe proof-of-concept (3 real Trees)
tasks.scope_in: A throwaway dark-globe prototype with the 3 real Trees, auto-rotation, one pulse arc, brand tokens, and a 2D/reduced-motion fallback — to validate look and performance budget. GATED on Richard's go.

tasks.title: Performance budget + device targets
tasks.scope_in: Concrete budgets: landing-shell JS, lazy globe bundle, FPS floors, memory, device/browser targets, and the techniques to hold them.

tasks.title: Atlas data & privacy contract mapping
tasks.scope_in: Map the public Atlas endpoints (tiles/nodes/node) to the frozen SPEC fields and the geohash privacy model; define what is public vs. owner-only.
definition_of_done: No precise GPS in any public path
